# desec_domains (Data Source)

Retrieves the list of all deSEC DNS zones owned by the account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all domains in the account
data "desec_domains" "all" {}

output "domain_names" {
  value = [for d in data.desec_domains.all.domains : d.name]
}

# Find the authoritative domain for a specific DNS name
data "desec_domains" "responsible" {
  owns_qname = "www.example.com"
}

output "responsible_domain" {
  value = length(data.desec_domains.responsible.domains) > 0 ? data.desec_domains.responsible.domains[0].name : null
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `owns_qname` (String) Filter to return only the domain responsible for this DNS query name (at most one result).

### Read-Only

- `domains` (Attributes List) List of domains. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--domains))

<a id="nestedatt--domains"></a>
### Nested Schema for `domains`

Read-Only:

- `created` (String) Timestamp of domain creation.
- `minimum_ttl` (Number) The minimum TTL for RRsets in this domain.
- `name` (String) The domain name.
- `published` (String) Timestamp of last DNS publication.
- `touched` (String) Timestamp of last touch.
